title: rhus engleri
intro: Rhus engleri, also known as the Chinese sumac, is a plant species in the family Anacardiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhus engleri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Rhus engleri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in topical applications to treat skin conditions.
